description: Implement a dynamic pricing strategy for the Chinook music store using the SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_pricing.db (connection name: 'ChinookPricing'). The strategy requires updating the 'tracks' table UnitPrice based on purchase popularity in 'invoice_items': $1.49 for 5+ purchases (Platinum), $1.29 for 2-4 (Gold), $0.99 for 1 (Standard), and $0.79 for 0 (Discount), with an additional $0.30 surcharge for any track longer than 500,000 milliseconds. Historical records in the 'invoice_items' table must also be updated to reflect these new prices. Generate a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/pricing_summary.csv including 'Tier', 'TrackCount', 'AvgNewPrice', 'AvgOldPrice', and 'RevenueImpact' (calculated as the sum of the price difference for all tracks in that tier). Save the resulting SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/pricing_update.sql.
